kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 - Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Verify Locked User Error Message
Get Error Message Text
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${message} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Sorry, this user has been locked out
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 - Sort Products By Price Low To High

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: When Sort Products By Price Low To High
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css=.product_sort_container' by value lohi.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Then Verify Products Sorted By Price Ascending
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given Navigate Back To Products Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: When Add Product To Cart And Navigate To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Remove Product And Verify Cart Is Empty
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
